masked_resume.professional_summary: Results-driven Data Scientist and Data Analyst with 3.5+ years of experience in NLP, machine learning, and conversational AI for large-scale BFSI clients. Proven expertise in building and validating ML models, designing knowledge graphs (ontology) ,performing statistical analysis, Automation using Jenkins and delivering data-driven insights to optimize operational efficiency. Proficient in Python, SQL, Scikit-learn, and data visualization tools. Strong domain knowledge in banking and financial services with a track record of measurable performance improvements. Seeking to leverage a strong ML, NLP, and data analytics foundation in Data Analyst or Data Scientist roles.

projects.title: E-Commerce Customer Churn Prediction
description: Built an XGBoost classifier to predict customer churn with 92.09% accuracy using Python and scikit-learn.
Performed feature engineering, missing value treatment, and GridSearchCV-based hyperparameter tuning.
Evaluated model with Accuracy, Precision, Recall, and F1-Score to optimize for business-critical false-negative reduction.
Deployed as an interactive Streamlit web app with real-time prediction

projects.title: Brain Tumor Detection using CNN
description: Developed a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) to classify MRI brain scans as tumor-positive or tumor-negative using
TensorFlow and Keras.
Applied image preprocessing, data augmentation, and transfer learning by using cnn architecture MobileNetV2 to
improve model generalization and robustness.
Evaluated model performance using Accuracy, Precision, Recall, and F1-Score; achieved high classification accuracy on
the test dataset.
Built an end-to-end inference pipeline deployable via a Streamlit web application for real-time predictions.

projects.title: Titanic Survival Prediction

achieving 80.09% accuracy on test data and deployed as an interactive Streamlit web app with real-time prediction
